subject: How a tech at Tennant fixed a PowerFlex fault in 37 seconds
preview_text: No manual. No call to support. Just a photo and Mira’s reply.
headline: “I didn’t touch the HMI — I just opened FactoryLM”
body_html:
{{FIRST_NAME}},

Last Tuesday, Josh — lead tech at Tennant Co. — got a call for a tripped PowerFlex 525 on a conveyor line.

No manual. No downtime. He:

  1. Took a photo of the F001 fault code
  2. Posted it in FactoryLM’s chat
  3. Got a diagnosis from Mira in 37 seconds
  4. Auto-created work order, fixed in 8 min

No OEM call. No manual search. No 30 minutes of guessing.

You’re already using FactoryLM for your Allen-Bradley and hydraulic systems. Now it’s time to do the same.
